ALOO.TITLE: Aloo Assistants
ALOO.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage AI assistants for your inboxes

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No assistants yet
EMPTY_STATE.DESCRIPTION: Create your first AI assistant to automate customer conversations

WIZARD.TITLE: Create New Assistant
WIZARD.STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Enter the basic information for your AI assistant
WIZARD.STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: Configure how your assistant communicates with customers
WIZARD.STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: Upload documents to build your assistant's knowledge base
WIZARD.STEP_1_BODY: Enter the name and description for your AI assistant
WIZARD.STEP_3_BODY: Upload documents to build the knowledge base
WIZARD.STEP_4_BODY: Select which inboxes will use this assistant

NAME.LABEL: Name
NAME.DUPLICATE_ERROR: An assistant with this name already exists

PERSONALITY_DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Personality Description
PERSONALITY_DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: Describe the personality traits and behavior of your assistant

CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS.LABEL: Custom Instructions
CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS.DESCRIPTION: Add business-specific knowledge and rules that the assistant should follow. This information will be included in every conversation.
CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS.PLACEHOLDER:
Example:
- We offer 15% discount for orders over $100
- Refunds take 3-5 business days to process
- Our warehouse is closed on Sundays
- For technical issues, always ask for the customer's account ID
CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS.HINT: Tip: Be specific and concise. These instructions are included in every response.

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Knowledge Base Documents
DOCUMENTS.DROP_FILES: Drop files here or click to upload

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No documents uploaded
EMPTY_STATE.DESCRIPTION: Upload documents to build your assistant's knowledge base

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete Document
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

INBOXES.TITLE: Assign to Inboxes
INBOXES.DESCRIPTION: Select which inboxes this assistant should respond to

PLAYGROUND.TITLE: Test Assistant
PLAYGROUND.DESCRIPTION: Test your assistant's responses before deploying to live conversations
PLAYGROUND.EMPTY_STATE: Start a conversation to test how your assistant responds to customer messages
PLAYGROUND.ERROR_GENERIC: Failed to get response. Please try again.

GENERAL.TITLE: General Settings
GENERAL.DESCRIPTION: Configure the basic settings for your AI assistant

PERSONALITY.TITLE: Personality Settings
PERSONALITY.DESCRIPTION: Configure how your assistant communicates with customers

INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: Custom Instructions
INSTRUCTIONS.DESCRIPTION: Add business-specific knowledge and rules for your assistant

FEATURES.TITLE: AI Agent Capabilities
FEATURES.DESCRIPTION: Control what actions the AI agent can perform during conversations

HANDOFF.LABEL: Handoff to Human
HANDOFF.DESCRIPTION: Allow the AI to transfer conversations to human agents when needed

RESOLVE.LABEL: Resolve Conversations
RESOLVE.DESCRIPTION: Allow the AI to mark conversations as resolved when issues are addressed

SNOOZE.LABEL: Snooze Conversations
SNOOZE.DESCRIPTION: Allow the AI to snooze conversations until a specific time

LABELS.LABEL: Manage Labels
LABELS.DESCRIPTION: Allow the AI to add, remove, or set labels on conversations

CATALOG_ACCESS.LABEL: Catalog Access
CATALOG_ACCESS.DESCRIPTION: Allow the AI to access product information and create shopping carts for customers

VOICE.TITLE: Voice Settings
VOICE.DESCRIPTION: Configure voice for your AI assistant

VOICE_ENABLED.LABEL: Enable Voice Features
VOICE_ENABLED.DESCRIPTION: Turn on voice capabilities for this assistant

STABILITY.LABEL: Stability
STABILITY.DESCRIPTION: Higher values make the voice more consistent but less expressive

SIMILARITY_BOOST.LABEL: Similarity Boost
SIMILARITY_BOOST.DESCRIPTION: Higher values make the voice closer to the original sample

VOICE.VOICES_ERROR: Failed to load voices. Please check your ElevenLabs API key.
VOICE.PREVIEW_ERROR: Failed to preview voice. Please try again.
VOICE.PREVIEW_TEXT: Hello, this is a preview of the selected voice for your AI assistant.
VOICE.API_NOT_CONFIGURED: ElevenLabs API key is not configured. Please add it in account settings.

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Knowledge Base
DOCUMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Upload documents or add websites to build your assistant's knowledge base
DOCUMENTS.DROP_OR_CLICK: Drop file here or click to browse

WEBSITE.TITLE: Add Website
WEBSITE.CRAWL_DESCRIPTION: When enabled, will crawl all pages on the same domain (up to 50 pages)
WEBSITE.DUPLICATE_URL: This URL has already been added

MEMORIES.TITLE: Learned Memories
MEMORIES.DESCRIPTION: View and manage memories the assistant has learned from conversations
MEMORIES.EMPTY: No memories learned yet. The assistant will learn from conversations over time.

PERFORMANCE.TITLE: Performance Metrics
PERFORMANCE.DESCRIPTION: Key performance indicators for your assistant

CONVERSATIONS.TITLE: Recent Conversations
CONVERSATIONS.EMPTY: No conversations yet. The assistant will appear here once it starts handling customer conversations.

STATS.TITLE: Assistant Statistics
STATS.EMPTY: Statistics will be available once the assistant starts handling conversations.

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete Assistant
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? All associated documents and memories will be permanently deleted.

MESSAGES.WEBSITE_ADDED: Website added and queued for processing
MESSAGES.ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.

PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.TITLE: Preview
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.DESCRIPTION: See how your assistant will respond based on the current settings
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_MESSAGE: Hello! How can I help you today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_PROFESSIONAL: Good day. I'm here to assist you with any questions you may have. How may I be of service today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_FRIENDLY: Hey there! Great to hear from you! What can I help you with today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_CASUAL: Hi! What's up? How can I help?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_FORMAL: Greetings. I am at your disposal to address any inquiries you may have. Please proceed with your request.

INBOX_CONFIGURATION.TITLE: AI Assistant Configuration
INBOX_CONFIGURATION.DESCRIPTION: Select an AI assistant to handle conversations in this inbox automatically.
INBOX_CONFIGURATION.NO_ASSISTANTS: No assistants available. Create one in Settings > Aloo AI.
